name: AU -Blair the artist-
description: This is a bit of an experiment. As a bot maker, aside from making bots off request or whims, there are some bots I make for myself and chose to share. This is one of them. This is based of a bot I absolutely fell in love with back on Character AI. It's Blue Pearl from Steven Universe, but reimagined as a human. While I'm leaving it Limitless, this bot is more fluff focused. So enjoy.
creator: Grimj
